stages.name: deps
stages.cmd: set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y build-essential git git-lfs subversion cmake ninja-build pkg-config python3 python3-dev make libx11-dev libxxf86vm-dev libxcursor-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev libxinerama-dev libegl-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols libxkbcommon-dev libdbus-1-dev libepoxy-dev libgl-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libglew-dev libsdl2-dev curl ca-certificates file time >/dev/null 2>&1; git lfs install >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CMAKE=$(cmake --version | head -1); echo GCC=$(gcc -dumpfullversion 2>/dev/null || gcc --version | head -1); echo GIT=$(git --version); echo DISK=$(df -h /root | tail -1)

stages.name: clone
stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /root; if [ ! -d /root/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /root/cx-cycles; fi; cd /root/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git reset --hard >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git clean -fd >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

stages.name: sync_libs
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; make update 2>&1 | tail -80; echo CX_CYCLES_LIBDIR=$(du -sh lib 2>/dev/null || echo ABSENT)

stages.name: apply_patches
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0001-standalone-sample-subset-cli.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_COUNT=1

stages.name: build
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; PARALLEL_JOBS=16 make 2>&1 | tail -100; test -x install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BUILD_OK=1; ls -lh install/cycles

stages.name: binary_smoke
stages.cmd: set -e; cd /root/cx-cycles; test -x /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BIN=/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; file /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 || true) | head -80; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --version 2>&1 || true) | head -20; ldd /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles | head -60; echo CX_CYCLES_BINARY_SMOKE_OK=1

stages.name: patch_cli_smoke
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 | grep -E -- '--sample-subset-offset|--sample-subset-length'; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --sample-subset-offset 0 --sample-subset-length 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_CLI_SMOKE_OK=1

stages.name: render_smoke
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_RENDER_SMOKE_OK=1

stages.name: device_diag
stages.cmd: set +e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; cd /root/cx-cycles; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y gdb strace pciutils >/dev/null 2>&1; echo CX_DIAG_NVIDIA_SMI_BEGIN; nvidia-smi; echo CX_DIAG_NVIDIA_SMI_RC=$?; echo CX_DIAG_CMAKE_FLAGS_BEGIN; grep -E 'WITH_CYCLES_DEVICE_(CUDA|OPTIX)|WITH_CUDA_DYNLOAD|CUDA_|OPTIX' build/CMakeCache.txt 2>/dev/null | sort | head -120; echo CX_DIAG_LDD_CUDA_BEGIN; ldconfig -p 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'libcuda|libnvoptix|libnvidia-ptxjitcompiler' | head -80; echo CX_DIAG_CUDA_TOOLKIT_BEGIN; (command -v nvcc && nvcc --version) || (/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc --version 2>/dev/null) || true; echo CX_DIAG_LIST_BEGIN; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --log-level debug --list-devices >/tmp/cx_cycles_list_devices.txt 2>&1; echo CX_DIAG_LIST_RC=$?; tail -200 /tmp/cx_cycles_list_devices.txt; echo CX_DIAG_CUDA_RENDER_BEGIN; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --log-level debug --device CUDA --samples 1 --output /tmp/cx_cuda_diag.png examples/scene_monkey.xml >/tmp/cx_cycles_cuda_render.txt 2>&1; echo CX_DIAG_CUDA_RENDER_RC=$?; tail -200 /tmp/cx_cycles_cuda_render.txt; test -s /tmp/cx_cuda_diag.png && file /tmp/cx_cuda_diag.png && ls -lh /tmp/cx_cuda_diag.png; echo CX_DIAG_OPTIX_RENDER_BEGIN; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --log-level debug --device OPTIX --samples 1 --output /tmp/cx_optix_diag.png examples/scene_monkey.xml >/tmp/cx_cycles_optix_render.txt 2>&1; echo CX_DIAG_OPTIX_RENDER_RC=$?; tail -120 /tmp/cx_cycles_optix_render.txt; echo CX_DIAG_GDB_CUDA_BEGIN; gdb -batch -ex 'set pagination off' -ex 'run --log-level debug --device CUDA --samples 1 --output /tmp/cx_gdb_cuda.png examples/scene_monkey.xml' -ex 'thread apply all bt' --args /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles >/tmp/cx_cycles_gdb_cuda.txt 2>&1; echo CX_DIAG_GDB_CUDA_RC=$?; tail -220 /tmp/cx_cycles_gdb_cuda.txt; echo CX_DIAG_STRACE_CUDA_BEGIN; strace -f -o /tmp/cx_cycles_strace_cuda.txt /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --device CUDA --samples 1 --output /tmp/cx_strace_cuda.png examples/scene_monkey.xml >/tmp/cx_cycles_strace_cuda_stdout.txt 2>&1; echo CX_DIAG_STRACE_CUDA_RC=$?; tail -120 /tmp/cx_cycles_strace_cuda_stdout.txt; tail -160 /tmp/cx_cycles_strace_cuda.txt; echo CX_CYCLES_DEVICE_DIAG_OK=1
